name.zh: Precision Reflex GEN III SPR 机匣顶部导轨
name.en: AR-15 Precision Reflex GEN III SPR Top Rail

description.zh: 步枪规格的全尺寸机匣顶部全通式皮卡汀尼导轨，可加装在 Precision Reflex GEN III 圆形护木上，将护木与上机匣连通为一体。由 Precision Reflex 公司设计制造。
description.en: A rifle length Picatinny top rail designed for installation on Precision Reflex GEN III Round handguards. Bridges the handguard and upper receiver. Manufactured by Precision Reflex.
